name: Mince Pie
recipeIngredient: Apples, prepared as for pie (9 quarts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients for the mincemeat filling.
2. Use enough mincemeat to fill 20 pie shells.
3. Place the prepared mincemeat in each pie shell.
4. Add a few drops of brandy over the mincemeat.
5. Top with the second crust and seal the edges.
6. Bake at 450 degrees Fahrenheit for about 30 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Reduce heat to 350°F and bake an additional 20-25 minutes until fully cooked through.
